component.name: Mulberry
component.summary: Traditional email and calendar client with IMAP and CalDAV support

description.p: Mulberry is a feature-rich desktop email and calendar client supporting modern internet standards for email, calendars, and contacts. It provides a traditional three-pane interface with offline synchronization and standards-compliant protocol support.

ul.li: Email: IMAP4rev1, POP3, and SMTP with SSL/TLS encryption
Calendars: CalDAV protocol with iCalendar (RFC 5545) format support
Contacts: CardDAV and LDAP directory services
Server-side filtering using SIEVE scripting language
Message security: GPG and S/MIME encryption support
Advanced message threading and search capabilities

description.p: Note: Mulberry is mature software originally developed by Cyrus Daboo. Upstream development appears to be very limited. The software lacks modern features like OAuth2 authentication. Users seeking actively maintained alternatives should consider Thunderbird or Evolution.
Modernization release for Ubuntu 24.04 and current Debian systems:

ul.li: Rebuilt for 64-bit x86_64 architecture with GCC 13
OpenSSL 3.x compatibility with modern SSL/TLS libraries
Desktop integration with mailto: and webcal: URL handlers
Security hardening with modern compiler flags
